title: AMENDMENT TO SO 1503(E) DATED 11.05.2017

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 1659] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] twu 9] 2017@T;s"B 19] 1939 No. 1659] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JUNE 9, 2017/JYAISTHA 19, 1939 कोयला मंᮢालय कोयला मंᮢालय कोयला मंᮢालय कोयला मंᮢालय अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 9 जून, 2017 का.आ. का.आ. का.आ. का.आ. 1870 1870 1870 1870(अ (अ (अ (अ)))). —के᭠ᮤीय सरकार, कोयला खान भिव᭬य िनिध तथा िविवध उपबंध अि धिनयम, 1948 (1948 का 46) कᳱ धारा 3क कᳱ उप-धारा (1) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (ii) मᱶ ᮧकािशत भारत सरकार के कोयला मंᮢाल य कᳱ तारीख 11 मई, 2017 कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 1503(अ), मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत संशोधन कर ती है:- उᲦ अिधसूचना मᱶ, ᮓम सं᭎या 17 को हटा ᳰदया जाए । [फा. सं. 20/210/5/2016-पीआरआईड᭣᭨यू-III] आर. पी. गु᳙ा, संयुᲦ सिचव ᳯट᭡पण : ᳯट᭡पण : ᳯट᭡पण : ᳯट᭡पण : मूल अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 1503(अ), तारीख 11 मई, 2017 जो भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (ii) मᱶ ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF COAL NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th June, 2017 S.O. 1870(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3A of the Coal Mines Provident Fund and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1948 (46 of 1948), read with paragraph 4 of the Coal Mines Provident Fund Scheme, 1948 the Central Government hereby amends the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Coal, vide number S.O.1503(E) dated 11 May, 2017 published in Part- II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) of the Gazette of India. In the said notification, serial number 17 shall be excluded. [F. No. 20/210/5/2016-PRIW-III] R. P. GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (ii) vide number S.O. 1503(E) dated 11th May, 2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
